scripts.dev: concurrently "esbuild src/main.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/app.js --sourcemap --watch --target=es2022" "npx @tailwindcss/cli -i styles/main.css -o dist/styles.css --watch" "node scripts/copy-assets.mjs --watch" "npx serve dist -p 5173"
scripts.build: esbuild src/main.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/app.js --minify --target=es2022 && npx @tailwindcss/cli -i styles/main.css -o dist/styles.css --minify && node scripts/copy-assets.mjs
scripts.deploy: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name gitma
scripts.test: npx tsx test/smoke.ts && npx tsx test/commit-score.test.ts
